ModMetaData.name: New Beginnings
ModMetaData.author: Anna
ModMetaData.description:
Set your colonists free. Send them to a friendly faction to start a new life.
Pick colonists, items, and animals to send. Form a special caravan that travels to a friendly settlement. When they arrive, the colonists join that faction as world pawns — they can marry, have children, and show up in future events.
75% of the wealth you send counts as a gift, boosting faction relations. Your colony gets a mood boost for giving someone a fresh start.
